response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS skills, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his most recent experience is at a staff engineer level, which may be overqualified for a junior/mid-level position. Additionally, his background leans heavily toward Node.js and JavaScript ecosystems rather than PostgreSQL and Nest.js, which are prioritized in the job description.
strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience across multiple stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, MongoDB)
Strong background in scalable system design, CI/CD, and modern software practices (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Proven ability to integrate diverse data sources and build pragmatic, user-focused solutions
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with recent staff engineer and senior experience
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js, which are core requirements
Recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure may not align well with the role's renewable energy/construction technology domain
